cmseeddrill000000000000001.name: Straight cueing control
cmseeddrill000000000000001.description: A basic drill for a straight cue action, stable stance and center-ball contact without unwanted side spin.
cmseeddrill000000000000001.goal: Build a reliable straight delivery before potting and positional drills.
cmseeddrill000000000000001.rules: Place the cue ball on the brown line and a red in the center of the table. Play 20 shots at one tempo. After each shot, mark whether the cue ball left the line.
cmseeddrill000000000000001.successCriteria: At least 16 of 20 shots stay on line, with the cue ball remaining in the central corridor after contact.

cmseeddrill000000000000002.name: Long red to the corner
cmseeddrill000000000000002.description: Long potting practice with sighting control and a calm acceleration through the cue ball.
cmseeddrill000000000000002.goal: Improve the long-red percentage and remove forced cueing on distance shots.
cmseeddrill000000000000002.rules: Play the red to the far top corner from the diagram position. Complete 5 sets of 10 shots, fixing the contact point before each shot.
cmseeddrill000000000000002.successCriteria: At least 5 reds potted in every set, with stable stance and repeatable preparation time.

cmseeddrill000000000000003.name: Black with position on blue
cmseeddrill000000000000003.description: A positional drill: pot the black and bring the cue ball into a working zone for a continuation through blue.
cmseeddrill000000000000003.goal: Learn to control pace after the black and avoid leaving the cue ball tight to a cushion.
cmseeddrill000000000000003.rules: Play the black to the top right corner. After contact, the cue ball should return to the marked zone near the blue. Play 4 sets of 8 shots.
cmseeddrill000000000000003.successCriteria: At least 60% blacks potted and at least 50% cue-ball zone hits.

cmseeddrill000000000000004.name: Small break around the pink
cmseeddrill000000000000004.description: Break-building around pink and black to train next-ball choice, tempo and short cue-ball control.
cmseeddrill000000000000004.goal: Build a stable mini-break from reds around the pink while returning to pink or black.
cmseeddrill000000000000004.rules: Start from a chosen red near the pink. After each red, play a color and return to one of the marked zones. Work in runs of 6 reds.
cmseeddrill000000000000004.successCriteria: A 12+ point break in at least three of five attempts, without drifting the cue ball to a cushion after the color.

cmseeddrill000000000000005.name: Safe baulk safety
cmseeddrill000000000000005.description: A classic safety: send the object ball up-table and bring the cue ball back into baulk behind the colors.
cmseeddrill000000000000005.goal: Build a reliable safety that leaves the opponent a long, difficult reply.
cmseeddrill000000000000005.rules: Play a thin contact on the red. The cue ball returns into the marked baulk zone via a cushion, and the red leaves an easy potting line.
cmseeddrill000000000000005.successCriteria: In 7 of 10 attempts the cue ball finishes in baulk and the opponent has no short direct pot.

cmseeddrill000000000000006.name: One-cushion snooker escape
cmseeddrill000000000000006.description: Practice calculating a cushion angle and controlling speed when escaping from a snooker.
cmseeddrill000000000000006.goal: Hit the object ball reliably through one cushion and leave a safe reply.
cmseeddrill000000000000006.rules: The cue ball is blocked by colors. Calculate the angle from the bottom cushion and hit the red. Start without potting pressure, then add safety control.
cmseeddrill000000000000006.successCriteria: At least 8 red contacts from 10 attempts, with no more than two fouls from pace or a miss.

cmseeddrill000000000000007.name: Final black under pressure
cmseeddrill000000000000007.description: A repeatable deciding-black situation: routine, breathing and one quality shot under score pressure.
cmseeddrill000000000000007.goal: Make the pre-shot routine stable when the shot value is higher than in normal practice.
cmseeddrill000000000000007.rules: Call the score before each shot and complete the full routine. The run ends after a miss or after 10 consecutive pots.
cmseeddrill000000000000007.successCriteria: Best streak of 7+ final blacks with the same routine and no rushed preparation.

cmseeddrill000000000000008.name: 6 reds: break control
cmseeddrill000000000000008.description: A match-style mini-break with six reds, correct color choice and decision-error tracking.
cmseeddrill000000000000008.goal: Transfer technical skills into a game scenario: plan, execute and adjust after errors.
cmseeddrill000000000000008.rules: Set six reds as shown. Play by match rules: red, color, next red. After the run, record whether the stop came from a decision or execution error.
cmseeddrill000000000000008.successCriteria: Average 18+ points per attempt with a clear reason why each break ended.
